ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: filling 72% [sugar, palm fat, fat reduced cocoa powder, chocolate powder 3% (sugar, cocoa mass, fat reduced cocoa powder, vegetable fat: palm, shea, emulsifier: soya lecithin, flavour), corn starch, flavouring], wafer 28% (wheat flour, palm fat, emulsifier: soya lecithin, raising agent: sodium carbonates, salt), may contain milk, peanut and nuts
